project.name: 14ch_dispensing_system
project.description: 14-channel gravimetric dispensing system with Arduino Giga R1 WiFi, plug-in BIGTREETECH TMC2209 modules, plug-in HiLetgo MAX3232 RS232 converter, and JST-XH pump connections.
project.author: Jimmy Chang

fields.Description: Arduino Giga R1 WiFi with STM32H747 MCU
RS232 to TTL Converter Module (socketed on female header)
BIGTREETECH TMC2209 Stepper Driver Module Socket (Channel 1)
4-pin JST-XH connector for Kamoer KPHM100 stepper pump (Channel 1)
2-pin JST-GH connector for limit switch (Channel 1)
BIGTREETECH TMC2209 Stepper Driver Module Socket (Channel 2)
4-pin JST-XH connector for Kamoer KPHM100 stepper pump (Channel 2)
2-pin JST-GH connector for limit switch (Channel 2)
BIGTREETECH TMC2209 Stepper Driver Module Socket (Channel 3)
4-pin JST-XH connector for Kamoer KPHM100 stepper pump (Channel 3)
2-pin JST-GH connector for limit switch (Channel 3)
BIGTREETECH TMC2209 Stepper Driver Module Socket (Channel 4)
4-pin JST-XH connector for Kamoer KPHM100 stepper pump (Channel 4)
2-pin JST-GH connector for limit switch (Channel 4)
BIGTREETECH TMC2209 Stepper Driver Module Socket (Channel 5)
4-pin JST-XH connector for Kamoer KPHM100 stepper pump (Channel 5)
2-pin JST-GH connector for limit switch (Channel 5)
BIGTREETECH TMC2209 Stepper Driver Module Socket (Channel 6)
4-pin JST-XH connector for Kamoer KPHM100 stepper pump (Channel 6)
2-pin JST-GH connector for limit switch (Channel 6)

4-pin JST-XH connector for Kamoer KPHM100 stepper pump (Channel 7)
2-pin JST-GH connector for limit switch (Channel 7)
BIGTREETECH TMC2209 Stepper Driver Module Socket (Channel 8)
4-pin JST-XH connector for Kamoer KPHM100 stepper pump (Channel 8)
2-pin JST-GH connector for limit switch (Channel 8)
BIGTREETECH TMC2209 Stepper Driver Module Socket (Channel 9)
4-pin JST-XH connector for Kamoer KPHM100 stepper pump (Channel 9)
2-pin JST-GH connector for limit switch (Channel 9)
BIGTREETECH TMC2209 Stepper Driver Module Socket (Channel 10)
4-pin JST-XH connector for Kamoer KPHM100 stepper pump (Channel 10)
2-pin JST-GH connector for limit switch (Channel 10)
BIGTREETECH TMC2209 Stepper Driver Module Socket (Channel 11)
4-pin JST-XH connector for Kamoer KPHM100 stepper pump (Channel 11)
2-pin JST-GH connector for limit switch (Channel 11)
BIGTREETECH TMC2209 Stepper Driver Module Socket (Channel 12)
4-pin JST-XH connector for Kamoer KPHM100 stepper pump (Channel 12)
2-pin JST-GH connector for limit switch (Channel 12)
BIGTREETECH TMC2209 Stepper Driver Module Socket (Channel 13)
4-pin JST-XH connector for Kamoer KPHM100 stepper pump (Channel 13)

bom.description: Main controller board (plugged into PCB via female headers)
HiLetgo MAX3232 RS232 to TTL Converter Module (plug-in)
BIGTREETECH TMC2209 Stepper Driver socket (dual 1x8 female header)
4-pin JST-XH vertical header for pump connection
2-pin JST-GH vertical header for limit switch
